name: Apple Butter 2
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces package of red hots candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens and reduces.
4. Remove from heat and let cool before serving or storing.
